allow: Bash(sshpass -p user ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 user@192.168.1.163 "echo 'Conexión exitosa'; whoami; hostname; uname -a")

Bash(sshpass -p user ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 -o PreferredAuthentications=password -o PubkeyAuthentication=no user@192.168.1.163 "echo 'Conexión exitosa'; whoami; hostname")
Bash(sshpass -p=user -k ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 -o PreferredAuthentications=password user@192.168.1.163 "echo 'Conexión exitosa'; whoami; hostname; uname -a")
Bash(sshpass -v -p=user ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 user@192.168.1.163 "echo ok")
Bash(SSHPASS=user sshpass -e ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 -o NumberOfPasswordPrompts=1 user@192.168.1.163 "echo ok")
Bash(sshpass -p=user -P="password" ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 user@192.168.1.163 "echo ok")
Bash(ssh -v -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o PasswordAuthentication=yes -o BatchMode=no user@192.168.1.163)
